zh.lifeSummary: 當Raoul III de Vexin於0980年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Gautier II de Vexin36歲，母親Alix Senlis28歲。他於1010年與Adelaide de Breteuil在法國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1030年2月11日在法國皮卡迪奧易享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raoul III de Vexin于0980年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Gautier II de Vexin36岁，母亲Alix Senlis28岁。他于1010年与Adelaide de Breteuil在法国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1030年2月11日在法国皮卡迪奧易享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vexin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Vane
meanings: variant of   Fayne   with southern English voicing of initial [f] to [v].

nameMeanings.name: Raoul
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Raoul III de Vexin was born in 0980, in Normandy, France, his father, Gautier II de Vexin, was 36 and his mother, Alix Senlis, was 28. He married Adelaide de Breteuil in 1010, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 11 February 1030, in Oise, Picardie, France, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raoul III de Vexin est né en 0980, à Normandie, France, son père, Gautier II de Vexin, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alix Senlis, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Adelaide de Breteuil en 1010, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 11 février 1030, à Oise, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raoul III de Vexin 0980 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gautier II de Vexin 36 und seine Mutter Alix Senlis 28. Er hat 1010 in Frankreich Adelaide de Breteuil geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 11. Februar 1030 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Oise, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul III de Vexin è nato il nel 0980 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Gautier II de Vexin, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Alix Senlis, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Adelaide de Breteuil nel 1010, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 febbraio 1030, nel Oise, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Raoul III de Vexinが0980年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Gautier II de Vexinは36歳，母Alix Senlisは28歳であった。1010年にフランスでAdelaide de Breteuilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1030年2月11日にフランスピカーディオイゼで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Raoul III de Vexin(이)가 0980년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gautier II de Vexin(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix Senlis(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1010년 프랑스에서 Adelaide de Breteuil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1030년 2월 11일 프랑스 피카디 이스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul III de Vexin nasceu em 0980, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Gautier II de Vexin, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alix Senlis, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelaide de Breteuil em 1010, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1030, em Oise, Picardie, França, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raoul III de Vexin родился в 0980 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Gautier II de Vexin было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix Senlis, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelaide de Breteuil в 1010 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 11 февраля 1030 г. в местности оис, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raoul III de Vexin nació en 0980, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Gautier II de Vexin, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Alix Senlis, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Adelaide de Breteuil en 1010, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de febrero de 1030, en Oise, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 50 años.
